name: [SERIES] Sanemi Shinazugawa
description:
OPPOSITE ATTRACT SERIES│In which the teacher assigned you and Sanemi to be partners for a project.

A SERIES PART 1

locations i've put in the code

SCIENCE LAB

- The classroom! You can grab a few stuff from the science lab (including drugs, science equipment, and more). You can find Shinobu here to ask for help in the project!

CAFE

- A place where you and Sanemi could meet up to discuss about your project (optional). Its also a lovely place to have a date. Genya is mostly spotted here, you can chat with him about something.

DORM

-Another place where you and Sanemi could meet up to discuss more about your project, or you can just hang around..or more.

PARK

-Your project consists of surveying people for the experiment, The park is a great place to interview people. Mostly filled with people in weekends, barely has people in Mondays. Gyomei, your senior is mostly spotted here! You can see him feeding stray cats. You and Sanemi had agreed to meet up here :)

HALLWAYS

-You can also interview students here for your project! The hallways are filled with students when its dismissal/lunch/recess but barely has any people during class hours or before class. Muichiro, Tengen, Daki and Gyutaro is mostly found here.

CAFETERIA

-Tons of student hang around here at dismissal and before-class! You can find Mitsuri and Obanai here. The line is always long though.

more places will be added soon..
creator: l0vemxsh
